title: Paul Messina | Senior Immigration Attorney | Colombo & Hurd
content:
Request A Consultation
Paul Messina is a Senior Immigration Attorney at Colombo & Hurd, where he focuses on employment-based immigration matters for individuals and multinational corporations across a wide range of industries.
Mr. Messina joined Colombo & Hurd in 2021, bringing nearly a decade of immigration law experience and a practice built on close collaboration with HR professionals, business executives, and foreign nationals navigating the U.S. immigration system. He advises clients on the full spectrum of employment-based immigration benefits, from temporary work visas to permanent residence, and has extensive experience before USCIS and the U.S. Department of State.
Before attending law school, Mr. Messina studied accounting and finance, and that background gives him a strong understanding of the business realities his corporate clients face. He recognizes that immigration decisions are often made within organizations balancing timelines, budgets, and competing priorities, and he brings that practical perspective to every matter he handles.
Mr. Messina is passionate about helping clients navigate the U.S. immigration system and takes pride in guiding individuals and businesses through important milestones. He values the opportunity to help clients pursue new opportunities and build their futures in the United States.

## Knowledge & Experience
- J.D., Maurice A. Deane School of Law at Hofstra University
- B.S.B.A. in Accounting and B.S.B.A. in Finance, University of Central Florida
- The Florida Bar Association
- American Immigration Lawyers Association
- Orange County Bar Association
- Dr. Phillips Chamber of Commerce
Outside the office, Mr. Messina enjoys spending time with his beautiful wife, visiting Orlando’s theme parks, and traveling, especially on cruises throughout the Caribbean and beyond. He is also closely connected to his church community, which remains an important part of his life. Faith, family, and community are central to his life outside of work. He is an avid sports fan who follows the New York Mets, New York Jets, Golden State Warriors, and UCF Knights.
